scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.watch:packages: concurrently -n client,core,server,talktogether,loki,nginx-proxy-manager -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red "npm run watch:packages:client" "npm run watch:packages:core" "npm run watch:packages:server" "npm run watch:packages:talktogether" "npm run watch:packages:loki" "npm run watch:packages:nginx-proxy-manager"
scripts.clean:all-node-modules: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const dirs=[]; const walk=(p)=>{let st; try{st=fs.statSync(p)}catch{return;} if(!st.isDirectory())return; if(path.basename(p)==='node_modules'){dirs.push(p); return;} for(const n of fs.readdirSync(p)) walk(path.join(p,n));}; for(const root of ['packages','projects']) walk(root); dirs.sort((a,b)=>b.length-a.length); for(const d of dirs) fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true,maxRetries:10,retryDelay:200}); fs.rmSync('node_modules',{recursive:true,force:true,maxRetries:10,retryDelay:200});"
